default_model: kimi-k2.6 (pinned best — flat-rate quota is hard to exhaust; degrading it would waste paid-for intelligence)
token_economy: Flat-rate subscription, under-used quota — a default workhorse. Use freely for long-context research, literature synthesis, and reading-heavy tasks once well-scaffolded. Subagent fan-out ON: internal parallelism converts idle quota into wall-clock speedup on decomposable tasks.
role: GENERAL-PURPOSE workhorse (fully capable coder) with a comparative edge in long-context work: literature review, multi-document analysis, prose synthesis (largest context window). best_for = comparative advantage under contention, NOT a partition — route code/tests here freely whenever instances are idle. Supports internal sub-agents (parallel isolated tasks).
best_for: code & tests (general-purpose — don't let the labels above idle it)
